criteria.criterion: `immune-floury-toad` activates `project.portability` with `exec: 1-TURN`, `facet: project-invariants`, `applies_at.scope: [container, leaf]`, `default_posture: blocking`, and `block_threshold: 0.9`

`indigoid-unmystic-serpent` proves specialization behind project configuration or an explicit extension boundary is a must-not-fire case
